---
title: "About me"
description-meta: "Research website about Juan Pablo Benavides-Tocarruncho"
image: "files/images/Guaviare.JPG"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    # - icon: sun
    #   text: Lab
    #   href: https://www.github.jbenavidest
    #   target: _blank
    # - icon: globe
    #   text: Uprofile
    #   href: https://baruch.cuny.edu
    #   target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:J.P.Benavides-Tocarruncho@exeter.ac.uk
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/juan-pablo-b-2422691b5/
      target: _blank
    # - icon: youtube
    #   text: YouTube
    #   href: https://www.youtube.com     
    #   target: _blank 


listing:   # Comment the listing section and delete corresponding lines in the index.qmd file to remove the recent posts
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: 
      - posts
      #- posts/post-links.yml
    exclude:
      title: ""
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
#    image-height: 150px
    page-size: 3 #set same as max-times to remove the page number setting
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle]
    max-description-length: 75
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
---

::: {#hero-heading}
I am a UKRI-funded PhD candidate studying plant functional ecology in dry tropical ecosystems, with a background in biology and applied data science.

Growing up in Colombia, I found my passion for becoming a scientist and speaking for ecosystems that cannot speak for themselves. I became a biologist at [UNAL](unal.edu.co) where I learned about functional traits and ecological restoration. I developed my interest in ecosystem modelling through an MSc in data science at [UoEx](exeter.ac.uk). I value reproducibility, collaboration and innovation. I try to put these values into my functional trait research about savannas, contrasting water and fire strategies across Africa and South America.

My broad interests include plant functional ecology and data science, with a focus on plant organs such as roots and hydraulic traits. I am interested in modelling ecosystems and aid ecosystem restoration and management for sustainable futures. I value the great biodiversity of tropical ecosystems, and I am keen on broadening understanding of these regions and their services for local communities and society.
:::

<!-- Delete the following section and delete corresponding lines in the yaml part to remove the recent posts -->

## Recent Posts

Check out the latest [Papers](/pages/posts.qmd#category=paper), [News](/pages/posts.qmd#category=news), [Events](/pages/posts.qmd#category=event), and [More »](/pages/posts.qmd)

::: {#recent-posts}
:::

<p align="right">

[All Posts »](/pages/posts.qmd)

</p>
